Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('@hugeicons/react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(pkg\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('whatsapp'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('menu'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('home'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('package'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('favourite'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('close'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('x0'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const h = require\('@hugeicons/react'\); const arrows = Object.keys\(h\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('arrow'\)\).sort\(\); console.log\(arrows.join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import * as h from '@hugeicons/react'; const keys = Object.keys\(h\).filter\(k => /[Aa]rrow/.test\(k\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\);")
